issue.title: www.programme-tv.net

labels.name: T: Anti Adblock Script
labels.description: The site detects ad blocking

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Anti Adblock Script) [https://www.programme-tv.net/programme/chaine/programme-rmc-decouverte-205.html](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.programme-tv.net%2Fprogramme%2Fchaine%2Fprogramme-rmc-decouverte-205.html) ### Comment > The web site detects AdGuard, hides the page content, and asks to disable AdGuard to be able to display the content of the web site. ``` Username: @GoPapaSmurf ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/5ute0lv7y98o4w4ssks4kw0k8wockc49l4edvldvv8.png?nc=1)
### System configuration Information | Value --- | --- AdGuard product: | AdGuard for Windows v7.22.5 (5262) System version: | `Microsoft Windows NT 10.0.22631.0` Browser: | Chrome License type: | paid AdGuard driver: | WFP Tracking protection: | **General settings**:
Block trackers,
Strip URLs from tracking parameters,
Hide your search queries,
Send Do-Not-Track header

**Tracking methods**:
Self-destructing third-party cookies (180)

**Windows tracking**:
Disable Windows Telemetry,
Turn off Advertising ID

**Miscellaneous**:
Remove X-Client-Data header from HTTP requests DNS filtering: | server: `https://dns.adguard-dns.com/dns-query`
filters: `AdGuard DNS Filter`, `User rules (url: none)` Filters: | Ad blocking:
AdGuard Base

Privacy:
AdGuard Tracking Protection,
AdGuard URL Tracking

Social widgets:
AdGuard Social Media

Annoyances:
AdGuard Cookie Notices,
EasyList Cookie List

Language-specific:
AdGuard Russian,
AdGuard French Custom filters: | `User rules (url: none)` Browsing Security: | enabled Browsing Security statistics: | disabled Userscripts: | `Bypass Paywalls Clean - fr (url: https://update.greasyfork.org/scripts/542354/Bypass Paywalls Clean - fr.user.js)`
`AdGuard Extra (url: https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/adguard-extra/1.0/adguard-extra.user.js)`
`AdGuard Popup Blocker (url: https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/popup-blocker/2.5/popupblocker.user.js)` Userstyles: | disabled Referrer: | [https://www.programme-tv.net/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.programme-tv.net%2F) Other extensions used: | `Google Translation, I don't care about cookies, My JDownloader, PageProbe, AdGuard, Google Search Maps Button, Camelizer, Previous Tab` ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=win&product_version=7.22.5+%285262%29&system_version=Microsoft+Windows+NT+10.0.22631.0&browser=chrome&filters=1.2.3.4.16.17.18.241&custom_filters=User%2520rules%2520%28url%253A%2520none%29&dns_servers=https%3A%2F%2Fdns.adguard-dns.com%2Fdns-query&userscripts=Bypass%2520Paywalls%2520Clean%2520-%2520fr%2520%28url%253A%2520https%253A%252F%252Fupdate.greasyfork.org%252Fscripts%252F542354%252FBypass%2520Paywalls%2520Clean%2520-%2520fr.user.js%29%252C%250AAdGuard%2520Extra%2520%28url%253A%2520https%253A%252F%252Fuserscripts.adtidy.org%252Frelease%252Fadguard-extra%252F1.0%252Fadguard-extra.user.js%29%252C%250AAdGuard%2520Popup%2520Blocker%2520%28url%253A%2520https%253A%252F%252Fuserscripts.adtidy.org%252Frelease%252Fpopup-blocker%252F2.5%252Fpopupblocker.user.js%29&dns.filters=AdGuard%2520DNS%2520Filter%252C%250AUser%2520rules%2520%28url%253A%2520none%29&dns.filters_enabled=true&dns.enabled=true&browsing_security.enabled=true&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=true&stealth.webrtc=false&stealth.push=false&stealth.location=false&stealth.flash=false&stealth.java=false&stealth.strip_url=true&stealth.hide_search_queries=true&stealth.DNT=true&stealth.x_client=true&stealth.dpi=false&stealth.third_party_cookies=180&stealth.disable_third_party_cache=false&stealth.block_third_party_auth=false&stealth.block_trackers=true&stealth.disable_wap_push_message_routing_service=false&stealth.disable_windows_defender=false&stealth.disable_windows_telemetry=true&stealth.turn_off_advertising_id=true&referrer=https%253A%252F%252Fwww.programme-tv.net%252F&win.wfp=true&license_type=paid&scheme_version=2&adblocking.enabled=true&dns.timeout=0&dns.fallback_mode=System&stealth.disable_windows_recall=true)

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
 [https://login.kt.com/wamui/CusMenuMainMobile.do](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Flogin.kt.com%2Fwamui%2FCusMenuMainMobile.do)
### Comment
> 현상 구현 (android)
> 1. 설정 -> 연결 -> 기타 연결 설정 -> 프라이빗 DNS ->  프라이빗 DNS 공급자 호스트 이름 입력 (dns.adguard-dns.com)
> 2. 안드로이드 마이케이티 앱을 다운로드
> 3. 마이케이티 앱 로그인 실행
> 
> 
> [호출 url]
> 
> https://login.kt.com/wamui/CusMenuMainMobile.do
> 
> ▼ 
> 
> https://m.kt.com/js/common/global/mKTGlobal.js?2026031240819
> 
> ▼
> 
> https://m.kt.com/js/common/global/oms.js?version=26011401
> 
> ▼
> 
> https://login.onmas.kt.com/js/mlogCollect.js?version=26011401
> 
>  
> 
> [오류 발생 url]
> 
> <script src="https://log.onmas.kt.com/js/mlogCollect.js?version=26011401"></script>
> 
> <script src="https://log.onmas.kt.com/js/mtargetOffer.js?version=26011401"></script>
> 
>  
> 
> log.onmas.kt.com 은 kt.com에 종속된 하위도메인입니다. 
> `support@adguard.com에` 메일을 보내드렸습니다. log.onmas.kt.com에 대한 도메인은 광고로 오탐되고 있으며 제외부탁드립니다.
```
Username: @최형진
```

### Screenshots
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1 </summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/3xlbbpn6omkgwosw8k8kwooooko8csc8bsykcbiwok.jpg?nc=1)
</details>
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/j59hi2278w8488ckgs80gk88kg4gos8nuw96zk9e9w.jpg?nc=1)
</details>

### System configuration

Information | Value
--- | ---
AdGuard product: | AdGuard DNS
DNS setup: | Device or router settings
DNS server: | AdGuard DNS Default server
System version: | `dns.adguard-dns.com`
Browser: | Chrome

comment.body:
안녕하세요, 이슈 제보자입니다. log.onmas.kt.com은 대한민국 통신사 중 하나인 KT(kt.com)의 하위 도메인으로, 서비스 운영에 필요한 로그 수집 도메인입니다. 광고나 개인정보 추적 목적이 아닙니다.
이 도메인이 차단되면 유튜브에 업로드된 영상처럼 네트워크에러가 발생하여 SNS ID 관리 기능에서 오류가 생깁니다.

AdGuard가 아닌 다른 블록리스트에서도 차단되고 있다고 하셨는데, 정확히 어떤 필터 리스트에서 차단되고 있는지 알 수 있을까요? 또한 서비스 필수 도메인인 만큼 화이트리스트 등록이 가능한지 검토 부탁드립니다.
